contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Rename Hit List 'AI: Photo rejected' → 'AI: No fit signal' across code, UI, docs + run migration
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/104
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/200
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/90
  
  Details:
  Per Gary's observation: the 'AI: Photo rejected' state name became misleading after the photo+Grok pipeline retired (PR #101). The state is now produced exclusively by the site-crawl-no-signal path in detect_circle_hosting_retailers, which has nothing to do with photos. Renamed to 'AI: No fit signal' across three repos: (1) go_to_market PR #104 — detect_circle_hosting_retailers.py constants + write/read paths with back-compat tuple LEGACY_REJECTED_STATUSES, hit_list_research_photo_review.py manual-only path remaps Grok's legacy output, populate_states_reference_sheet.py adds new canonical entry + keeps legacy explanation, HIT_LIST_CREDENTIALS.md updated, NEW scripts/rename_legacy_photo_rejected_status.py one-off bulk migration with DApp Remarks audit trail. (2) dapp PR #200 — stores_nearby.html + store_interaction_history.html + stores_by_status.html: status dropdowns, filter checkboxes (compact + expanded), update-status dropdown, statusDescriptions tooltip map; legacy values preserved as '(legacy)'-labeled entries so existing rows still render. (3) agentic_ai_context PR #90 — HIT_LIST_STATE_MACHINE.md Mermaid flowchart + state-definitions table + transition tables + cron schedule table all updated; PLACES_API_CACHING.md qualification-pipeline diagram updated (also fixed a pre-existing typo where the doc said 'AI: Warm-up needed' but the canonical state is 'AI: Warm up prospect'). Verified Oracle path requires zero code change — pipeline_metrics_snapshot GAS doesn't hard-code the legacy name; it auto-aggregates all distinct Status values from the Pipeline Dashboard sheet. Migration: refreshed States tab (104 entries written) + bulk-renamed 156 existing rows from legacy to new state, each with a DApp Remarks audit entry.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
